findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "authorize_action" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Pre-action authorization gateway — deterministic tool-call gating with cryptographic tokens
